# Skills (Token-Optimized)

Use these files as explicit references in prompts to reduce back-and-forth and avoid re-explaining project rules.

## Available Skills
- `firebird-query-skill.md` — native Firebird query and mapping patterns.
- `data-mapper-skill.md` — projection/model/DTO mapper patterns.
- `tenant-identity-skill.md` — retailer/customer identifier contract and anti-mixing checks.

## Recommended Prompt Pattern
`Use .github/skills/tenant-identity-skill.md + .github/instructions/api-integration.instructions.md for this change.`
